nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: Red-throated bee-eater
nodes.summary: Red-throated bee-eater（Red-throated bee-eater，学名 Merops bulocki），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its typical habitat is savannah with scattered trees, farmland with trees, the edges of marshes, bushy pastures and gardens, but the birds are rarely to be found far from the erosion gullies, streams and small rivers, in the banks of which they nest. thumb|Ground nests of red-throated bee-eaters next to a stream in Yankari National Park, Bauchi, Nigeria
